title: [Griffin's Keen, Switchbacks]
description: Chunks of rock and ice have fallen away from the wall, leaving a gap in the trail.  Iced over pegs and broken scraps of rope show where someone had once constructed a bridge here--or had tried.

wayto.3993: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'southwest'
wayto.3995: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'northwest'
